policy_human_readable:
Entry conditions (ALL must be true simultaneously):
  Rule 1: sma(100,) crosses_below price
  Rule 2: rsi(14,) crosses_below price

Exit conditions:
  (none - exits driven by stop-loss and take-profit only)

Stop-loss: atr_mult (2.9049998212141617, 20)
Take-profit: swing_high (35,)
